language.sectionDescription: Choose the language used across Glyph.
language.label: Language
language.description: Applies immediately to menus, settings, and navigation.
language.communityNotice: Translations are community-contributed and may be incomplete. Questions or improvements? <discord>Join Discord</discord>.

startup.sectionDescription: Choose what opens when you start Glyph.

openPreviousTabs.label: Open previous tabs
openPreviousTabs.description: Start this space with the tabs you left open.

editor.sectionDescription: Controls for editing behavior and note structure inside Glyph.

tableOfContents.label: Table of contents
tableOfContents.description: Show a floating table of contents for each note.

showFrontmatter.label: Show frontmatter in editor
showFrontmatter.description: Display YAML frontmatter at the top of notes while editing. Turning this off keeps frontmatter available to indexing and databases.

colorfulHeadings.label: Colorful headings
colorfulHeadings.description: Use distinct built-in colors for H1-H6 while editing notes.

collapsibleHeadings.label: Collapsible headings
collapsibleHeadings.description: Show collapse toggles on note headings in editor and preview.

spellCheck.label: Spell check
spellCheck.description: Underline typos as you type. Right-click a word to see spelling suggestions.

vimMode.title: Vim Mode
vimMode.label: Vim Mode
vimMode.description: Do NOT Turn this ON if you don't know what it means.
vimMode.insertMode: insert means normal typing mode. You type and text appears, like the editor already does.
vimMode.normalMode: normal means command mode. Your keys move around or edit text instead of typing letters.

help.I: Go to the start of the line and type.
help.A: Go to the end of the line and type.
help.o: Open a new line below and type.
help.O: Open a new line above and type.
help.hjkl: Move left, down, up, and right.
help.b: Jump back to the previous word.
help.e: Jump to the end of the word.
help.0: Jump to the start of the line.
help.dollar: Jump to the end of the line.
help.gg: Jump to the start of the note.
help.G: Jump to the end of the note.
help.x: Delete the character under or near the cursor.

fileTree.sectionDescription: Choose what appears in the sidebar file tree and Folio list.

folderCounts.label: Show folder file counts
folderCounts.description: Show a recursive file total at the end of each folder row in the file tree.

nonMarkdownFiles.label: Show non-Markdown files
nonMarkdownFiles.description: Show PDFs, images, and other attachments in the file tree and Folio list. Turning this off hides them from those views only.

sort.label: File tree sort
sort.description: Choose how folders and files are ordered in the sidebar tree.
